qa_pairs.question: Which incidents at 5716 Winton Street involved an unarmed subject named Parish Kimble who is Black, with a male officer named Hodack and no more than one subject involved?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
JOIN officers ON incidents.case_number = officers.case_number
JOIN subjects ON incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number
WHERE officers.last_name = 'Hodack' AND incidents.location = '5716 Winton Street' AND subjects.last_name = 'Kimble' AND subjects.first_name = 'Parish' AND officers.gender = 'M' AND incidents.subject_count <= 1 AND subjects.race = 'B' AND incidents.subject_weapon = 'Unarmed'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which incidents entities with location equal to '5716 Winton Street' and subject count at most '1' and subject weapon equal to 'Unarmed', having at least one related officers record (linked on incidents.case_number = officers.case_number) with last name equal to 'Hodack' and gender equal to 'M', having at least one related subjects record (linked on incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number) with last name equal to 'Kimble' and first name equal to 'Parish' and race equal to 'B'?

qa_pairs.question: Which incidents on 2004/4/18 involved a male Black subject named Bobby McDuff who was armed with a Handgun, deceased, and officers including Mike B/M; Owens?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
JOIN officers ON incidents.case_number = officers.case_number
JOIN subjects ON incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number
WHERE subjects.gender = 'M' AND subjects.race = 'B' AND incidents.officers LIKE '%Mike B/M; Owens%' AND subjects.first_name = 'Bobby' AND incidents.subject_statuses = 'Deceased' AND subjects.last_name = 'McDuff' AND incidents.date = '2004/4/18' AND incidents.subject_weapon = 'Handgun'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which incidents entities with officers matching '%Mike B/M; Owens%' and subject statuses equal to 'Deceased' and date equal to '2004/4/18' and subject weapon equal to 'Handgun', having at least one related officers record (linked on incidents.case_number = officers.case_number), having at least one related subjects record (linked on incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number) with gender equal to 'M' and race equal to 'B' and first name equal to 'Bobby' and last name equal to 'McDuff'?

qa_pairs.question: Which incidents that have related officers and related subjects occurred on 2009/9/21, have exactly one subject whose gender is exactly 'M'?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
JOIN officers ON incidents.case_number = officers.case_number
JOIN subjects ON incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number
WHERE subjects.gender = 'M' AND incidents.date = '2009/9/21' AND incidents.subject_count = 1
qa_pairs.question_pre_fix: Which incidents from 2009/9/21 involved exactly one subject who is male?
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which incidents entities with date equal to '2009/9/21' and subject count equal to '1', having at least one related officers record (linked on incidents.case_number = officers.case_number), having at least one related subjects record (linked on incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number) with gender equal to 'M'?

qa_pairs.question: Which incidents on 2015/8/27 involved male officers and Black subjects, and include Bertrand B/M among the subjects?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
JOIN officers ON incidents.case_number = officers.case_number
JOIN subjects ON incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number
WHERE incidents.date = '2015/8/27' AND officers.gender = 'M' AND subjects.race = 'B' AND incidents.subjects LIKE '%Bertrand B/M%'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which incidents entities with date equal to '2015/8/27' and subjects matching '%Bertrand B/M%', having at least one related officers record (linked on incidents.case_number = officers.case_number) with gender equal to 'M', having at least one related subjects record (linked on incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number) with race equal to 'B'?

qa_pairs.question: Which incidents at 5813 Bonnie View Road involve officer Jablon, have at least 2 subjects, and include a subject with the last name Hibbler?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
JOIN officers ON incidents.case_number = officers.case_number
JOIN subjects ON incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number
WHERE officers.last_name = 'Jablon' AND incidents.subject_count >= 2 AND incidents.location = '5813 Bonnie View Road' AND subjects.last_name = 'Hibbler'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which incidents entities with subject count at least '2' and location equal to '5813 Bonnie View Road', having at least one related officers record (linked on incidents.case_number = officers.case_number) with last name equal to 'Jablon', having at least one related subjects record (linked on incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number) with last name equal to 'Hibbler'?

qa_pairs.question: Which incidents involve exactly 1 subject armed with an Assault Rifle whose status is Shoot and Miss and where the officer’s last name is Rangel?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT incidents.case_number FROM incidents
JOIN officers ON incidents.case_number = officers.case_number
JOIN subjects ON incidents.case_number = subjects.case_number
WHERE incidents.subject_statuses = 'Shoot and Miss' AND incidents.subject_weapon = 'Assault Rifle' AND incidents.subject_count = 1 AND officers.last_name = 'Rangel'
